patch:
--- a/multiplexer.v
+++ b/multiplexer.v
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 module data_mux_4to1 (
   input [7:0] in_0,
   input [7:0] in_1,
   input [7:0] in_2,
   input [7:0] in_3,
   input [1:0] sel,
@@ -13,9 +13,9 @@
   output [7:0] mux_out
 );
   data_mux_4to1 mux_inst (
     .in_0(data_a),
-    .in_1(data_b),
     .in_2(data_c),
     .in_3(data_d),
     .sel(select),
     .mux_out(mux_out)
   );
 endmodule
after_code:
module data_mux_4to1 (
  input [7:0] in_0,
  input [7:0] in_1,
  input [7:0] in_2,
  input [7:0] in_3,
  input [1:0] sel,
  output [7:0] mux_out
);
  // mux logic
endmodule

module mux_system (
  input [7:0] data_a, data_b, data_c, data_d,
  input [1:0] select,
  output [7:0] mux_out
);
  data_mux_4to1 mux_inst (
    .in_0(data_a),
    .in_1(data_b),
    .in_2(data_c),
    .in_3(data_d),
    .sel(select),
    .mux_out(mux_out)
  );
endmodule
